ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TRIMARK ERF, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION.
Court granted Plaintiff's Oral Motion for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CHOCOCHIKEN DOWNTONW, LLC. a California limited liability coompany, dba CHOCOCHICKEN; KEITH PREVITE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,502.83
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,889.48
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $942.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $31,335.16
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys PC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not opposed. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT as to DEFENDANTS CHOCOCHICKEN DOWNTOWN, LLC dba CHOCOCHICKEN and KEITH PREVITE, indiv/dba CHOCOCHICKEN is granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. Moving party to prepare a proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
(Order signed after hearing.)
